message:
feat(engine): add 218 enrichment integration tests across 5 modules

Add enrichment integration test suites for modules that had basic
integration tests but no enrichment coverage:

- anti_entropy: 42 tests (IBLT operations, reconciliation sessions,
  fallback protocol, rate monitoring, serde roundtrips)
- bayesian_error_recovery: 45 tests (Bayesian update correctness,
  loss matrix optimality, evaluate lifecycle, multi-site, budget)
- calibration_sentinel: 43 tests (state classification, promotion
  rules, observability cells, report building, manifest determinism)
- catastrophe_witness_generator: 50 tests (phase regions, boundary
  detection, witness generation/minimization, brittleness reports)
- counterfactual_evaluator: 38 tests (IPS/DR/DirectMethod estimators,
  confidence envelopes, safety evaluation, policy comparison)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
